title: Enterprise Knowledge Graph RAG Platform
name: Enterprise Knowledge Graph RAG Platform
description: Developed an enterprise **KG-RAG** system over technical documentation using **LangGraph**, **LangChain**, **Neo4j**, and **Docker**. Designed multi-turn reasoning agents that combine graph traversal, pathfinding, tool calling, and self-correcting retrieval to answer complex technical questions.

title: Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Evaluation
name: Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Evaluation
description: Designed a framework for evaluating and localizing failures in multi-turn, tool-using **Agentic RAG** systems. Built a **LangGraph-based** synthetic benchmark pipeline to test reasoning and tool-calling trajectories, alongside an unsupervised auditing framework for enterprise retrieval workloads spanning more than **4 million corporate records**.

title: VectorDrive-Route: Autonomous BEV Trajectory Planning
name: VectorDrive-Route: Autonomous BEV Trajectory Planning
description: Built an end-to-end **PyTorch** pipeline using **nuScenes**, **ResNet**, and depth lifting to project multi-camera inputs into a **Bird's-Eye-View** representation. Designed a temporal motion-planning head with drivable-area and occupancy decoders to generate safe trajectories from changing traffic scenes.

title: Data Mapping Framework for Asset Administration Shells
name: Data Mapping Framework for Asset Administration Shells
description: Developed a data transformation framework to map heterogeneous enterprise schemas into standardized **Asset Administration Shell** representations. Designed automated alignment logic for relational and hierarchical data models, enabling interoperability across **Industry 4.0** systems.

title: See Your World
name: See Your World
description: Built an award-winning accessibility application that generates multilingual descriptions of visual scenes for people with visual impairments. Developed the image-captioning pipeline with **TensorFlow** and deployed it using **Flask**, **Docker**, and a cloud virtual machine, supporting voice output in **11 languages**.
